product_overview: Self-hosted backend that ingests news from RSS / HTML / YouTube / LinkedIn / X / Telegram via a rotating proxy pool, summarises, publishes to Telegram, and assembles short-form Reels using local FFmpeg. Replaces the previous n8n + Google Sheets + Shotstack stack.

general_info.name: Source Ingestion
general_info.overview: Periodic fetch of articles from registered sources of various kinds; HTTP through proxy pool; deduplication by canonical link.

goal_and_context.business_goal: Continuously gather AI/robotics/XR news without bot-blocks.
goal_and_context.user_problem: Editor needs a unified pipeline regardless of source format.

business_rules.description: All outbound HTTP to sources must go through ProxyPool when PROXY_POOL is configured.
Articles are deduplicated by canonical link (lower-case host, no UTM, no fragment).
A proxy with 3 consecutive failures is cooled down for 10 minutes.

acceptance_criteria.user_story: As an editor, I register a source by URL+kind so that pipeline starts pulling it.

bdd.then: The source row is created with is_active=true

acceptance_criteria.user_story: Outbound source fetches go through proxy.

bdd.when: Ingest task fetches a source URL
bdd.then: Outbound request uses one of the configured proxies

bdd.given: Article with link L was ingested
bdd.then: No new row is inserted

acceptance_criteria.user_story: Each source kind returns a normalized Article.

bdd.given: Adapter for kind K with fixture payload
and_preconditions: K in {rss, html, youtube_channel, linkedin_profile, x_profile, telegram_channel}
bdd.then: Result has link, title, source_id, raw_content

non_functional_requirements.description: User-Agent rotates from a pool of ≥5 strings.
Each external HTTP call has explicit timeout (default 30s).

general_info.name: Article Summarization
general_info.overview: LLM produces title_ru and content_ru per article.

goal_and_context.business_goal: Russian-language summary suitable for Telegram channel.
goal_and_context.user_problem: Editor doesn't want to translate manually.

business_rules.description: Output starts with bold headline (*…*) followed by an empty line.

acceptance_criteria.user_story: Summary keeps tech terms (LLM, multiagent systems).

bdd.then: Output contains 'LLM' or 'большая языковая модель'

bdd.given: First LLM call returns plain text without bold headline
bdd.then: A second call is made with strict-format instruction

general_info.name: Telegram Text Publication
general_info.overview: Posts summary to channel with throttling and retry.

goal_and_context.user_problem: Avoid rate limits and lost posts.

business_rules.description: ≥60 sec between two posts to same chat.
Up to 3 retries on 5xx with backoff 1s/4s/16s.

bdd.given: Two summaries ready for channel C
bdd.then: Second send happens ≥60 sec after the first

general_info.name: Voiceover Script
general_info.overview: LLM produces a 80–180 word RU narration script per article.

bdd.then: A second call is made with a 'tighten/expand' instruction

general_info.name: Segment Decomposition
general_info.overview: LLM cuts script into JSON segments with English keywords.

business_rules.description: Output must validate against segments-schema (id, text, keywords[1..5], estimated_duration_sec).

bdd.given: First LLM call returns malformed JSON
bdd.then: A second call with 'ONLY JSON' instruction succeeds

general_info.name: TTS Synthesis
general_info.overview: ElevenLabs MP3 per segment uploaded to MinIO.

business_rules.description: Same voice_id across all segments of one Reels.

acceptance_criteria.user_story: TTS uploads MP3 and saves duration.

bdd.then: S3 has tts/{R}/{S}.mp3 and segment.audio_duration_sec > 0

general_info.name: Stock Search & Vision Selection
general_info.overview: Pexels search + GPT-4o vision describe + LLM picker.

goal_and_context.business_goal: Visually relevant b-roll without manual editing.

business_rules.description: Picker must not repeat clip across one Reels.

bdd.given: 3 candidates with descriptions for segment S
bdd.then: Returns exactly one best_video_url not used by other segments of the same Reels

general_info.name: Video Assembly (FFmpeg)
general_info.overview: Local FFmpeg renders 1080x1920 MP4 from per-segment audio+video, subtitles, optional background music. Replaces Shotstack.

goal_and_context.business_goal: Eliminate paid render API; full control of pipeline.

business_rules.description: Each segment video is scaled+center-cropped to 1080x1920.
Each segment audio replaces source video audio.
Subtitles are split into 3-word chunks distributed equally over segment length.
Music when provided is mixed at volume 0.01 across full timeline.
Output S3 key is deterministic: renders/{job_id}.mp4.
Re-submitting a succeeded job returns existing output_uri without re-rendering.

acceptance_criteria.user_story: Submit a render and observe the lifecycle.

bdd.then: Response 202 + UUID job_id; GET eventually returns succeeded with output_uri renders/{job_id}.mp4
Returns argv list starting with 'ffmpeg' without touching disk or network

bdd.given: A render with one horizontal source clip
bdd.then: ffprobe reports width=1080, height=1920, codec=h264

bdd.given: Source video has loud audio + silent voiceover MP3
bdd.then: Output audio equals voiceover
Chunks match expected examples

input.text: a b c d e f g

acceptance_criteria.user_story: Music is mixed at low volume when provided.

bdd.then: argv contains -i music_uri and filter contains volume=0.01 + amix

acceptance_criteria.user_story: FFmpeg failure produces a failed job with message.

bdd.then: Job status=failed, error_message contains 'invalid input'
Returns same output_uri, no FFmpeg invocation
IllegalStateError is raised

non_functional_requirements.description: All external dependencies invoked with explicit timeout.

test_cases.assertion: POST=202 with UUID; GET=succeeded with output_uri renders/{id}.mp4

input.text: a b c d e f g

general_info.name: Reels Publication
general_info.overview: Send video to Telegram channel + update DB row.

goal_and_context.business_goal: Single source of truth per article in DB.

business_rules.description: Title and caption come from two independent prompts.

acceptance_criteria.user_story: After publish DB row holds video_url, title, caption.

bdd.then: DB row has non-empty video_url, title_video_ru, caption_video_ru

general_info.name: Pipeline Orchestration
general_info.overview: Celery-driven DAG and event bus replacing n8n.

bdd.given: Handler raises once on event E
bdd.then: Handler is retried and event eventually processed
